title: Create: Chipped Compatibility
description: EVERY block variant present in Chipped can be made via the Create mechanical saw for easy mass production of blocks!
body:
What this data pack does:

 

EVERY block variant present in Chipped can be made via the Create mechanical saw for easy mass production of blocks!

(Even ones that don't make sense like lanterns or leaves!)

Just put the Chipped block you want as a filter of the mechanical saw and use any of the blocks with the same Chipped tag to turn it into the desired filtered block.

 

Works with Chipped 3.0+ and Create 0.5+ tested on 1.19.2+

 

 

Older spiritual predecessors of this datapack that have been either discontinued or are for older versions of Create, Chipped and or Minecraft:
Chipped Create Compatibility
Create - Mechanical saw Chipped compatibility
